title: Ikanaide
longdescription:
Medium & Tools: Mix media, Premier pro, Procreate, FlipAClip

Equipment: Samsung S22+, ipad Air, Dell Inspiron 7506 2n1

This video was a passion project mixing my love for the song, the artist behind this specific song cover and the animation style utilized in Yorushika’s music video of “Say it”, blending them together within a rough 2-3 week time frame.

Each clip within this video was taken from real life locations, while the animation was drawn in a simple frame by frame style in 3fps. Everything was then put together, refined, and edited with the cut version of the Song.

title: KANA
longdescription:
Medium & Tools: Digital, Stopmotion, Lightroom Classic, Photoshop, Premier pro

Equipment: Panasonic HDC-tm40, Dell Inspiron 7506 2n1, Cardboard, Lined paper, Sharpie

KANA is a stop motion animation project based off an original character, which takes places in her own narrative world. with a little over 100 frames, this project was made with a blend of traditional and digital techniques, using 3D and simple 2D animation through photoshop and procreate, drawing over a few frames to bring more life to the characters. The limited sound was added to the animation to contribute more to the eeriness the short aimed to convey that I don't think could of been done with no sound at all.
